versions.version_description: I've spent the time to line-up the words with the rhythmic timing of the chords. This system makes it much easier to play / sing the song.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse]  
[tab]                  [ch]Ab[/ch]
Oh I leave quite an impression[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Ab[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]
Five feet to be exact[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Bb[/ch]
You're wonderin' why half his clothes went missin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]Ab[/ch]
My body's where they're at[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Cm[/ch]           [ch]Ab[/ch]     [ch]Eb[/ch]
Now I'm gone but you're still layin'[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Ab[/ch]
Next to me   one degree of separation[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                           [ch]Ab[/ch]
I heard you're back together and if that's true[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Ab[/ch]
You'll just have to taste me when    he's kissin' you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]Cm[/ch]            [ch]Ab[/ch]
If you want forever I bet    you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]Eb[/ch]
Just know you'll taste me too[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]Ab[/ch]    [ch]Cm[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]
Uhhuh               He    pins you down on the carpet[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]Ab[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]
Makes paintings with his tongue[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Cm[/ch]          [ch]Ab[/ch]
Hе's funny now all his jokes hit different[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]Ab[/ch]
Guеss who he learned that from[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Cm[/ch]           [ch]Ab[/ch]
Now I'm gone but you're still layin'[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Ab[/ch]
Next to me one   degree of separation[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]Cm[/ch]       [ch]Ab[/ch]
I heard you're back together and if that's true[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Ab[/ch]
You'll just have to taste me when    he's kissin' you[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Cm[/ch]      [ch]Ab[/ch]
If you want forever I  bet you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]Eb[/ch]
Just know you'll taste me too[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Cm[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch]
Lalalalalalala[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
Every    time you close your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]
And feel his lips you're feelin' mine[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]Eb[/ch]
And every time you breathe his air[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                         [ch]Bb[/ch]
Just know I was already there[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Cm[/ch]
You can have him if you like[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]
I've been there done that once or twice[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
And singin' 'bout it don't mean I care[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Ab[/ch]                      [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Cm[/ch]
Yeah I know    I've been known to share[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                       [ch]Cm[/ch]       [ch]Ab[/ch]
Well I heard you're back together and if that's true[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                                [ch]Eb[/ch]
You'll just have to taste me when    he's kissin' you[/tab]

If you want forever I bet you do

[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]Cm[/ch]           [ch]Ab[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]
Just know you'll taste    me too[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]       [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
Taste me                   too ow[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Ab[/ch]
You'll just have to taste me when    he's kissin' you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]Cm[/ch]      [ch]Ab[/ch]
You no    yeah    ahah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Ab[/ch]        [ch]Fm[/ch]
You'll just have to taste me when    he's kissin' you[/tab]

[Outro]
[ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]G7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
